item.title: FSIS Issues Public Health Alert For Frozen Ready-To-Eat Turkey Stuffed Pastry Products Due To Misbranding
item.product: FSIS Issues Public Health Alert For Frozen Ready-To-Eat Turkey Stuffed Pastry Products Due To Misbranding
item.summary: Shaw Bakers LLC Active Fri, 03/13/2026 - Current Midwest WASHINGTON, March 13, 2026 – The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s Food Safety and Inspection Service (FSIS) is issuing a public health alert for frozen ready-to-eat turkey stuffed pastry products due to misbranding. Some boxes of the turkey, pesto, and cheese stuffed pastries contain ham and... Impacted Products 25.4-oz. boxes containing eight pieces of “LA BOULANGERIE TURKEY PESTO & SWISS CHEESE POCKETS” with lot code 04926 and “best by” date 02/18/27 printed on the packaging. 005-2026-EXP High - Class I Product Contamination
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased the affected meat, poultry, or egg product.
item.remedy: Do not consume affected products; follow USDA FSIS recall or public health alert instructions.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, disposal, or return instructions if stated by the official notice
